diagnostic.message:

--- /Users/johnmelodyme/Documents/ctkqiang/HuntianDB/.github/workflows/release.yml
+++ /Users/johnmelodyme/Documents/ctkqiang/HuntianDB/.github/workflows/release.yml
@@ -42,7 +42,7 @@
   pull_request:
   push:
     tags:
-      - '*'
+      - '**[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+*'
 
 jobs:
   # Run 'dist plan' (or host) to determine what tasks we need to do
diagnostic.help:
run 'dist init' to update the file
('allow-dirty' in Cargo.toml to ignore out of date contents)
